$schema: v2 people resolution corpus — utterances paired with expected (person_id, ambiguous?) outcomes. Drives M3 LokiPeopleDBAdapter scoring bake-off and provisional-handle merge tests. Names use pop-culture characters per CLAUDE.md mock-data rule. Phase status: empty in M0; populate in M3 per docs/MEMORY_DESIGN.md §8 M3 corpus.

expect.resolved_person: string|null — pop-culture name (Luke, Leia, Padme, Anakin) or null
expect.is_provisional_handle: boolean — true if the case tests an unnamed-recurring-person path
expect.merge_target_handle: string|null — when testing a provisional → named merge
